TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kudrengere, title = Kudrengere, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kudrengere} }

S.FORM: Kudrengere alang Kudrengere ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 193 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 187 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 48%, Rukay 47%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. qalang Kudrengere ga ungat pqwasan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Kudrengere hya' ga Kucapungane. tay 'llaw na Kudrengere hya' ga Wutai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

Kudrengere alang Kudrengere ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 193 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 187 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 48%, Rukay 47%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. qalang Kudrengere ga ungat pqwasan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Kudrengere hya' ga Kucapungane. tay 'llaw na Kudrengere hya' ga Wutai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: ku*reŋere alaŋ ku*reŋere ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. qalaŋ ku*reŋere ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na ku*reŋere ħjaʔ ɣa kuʦ~ʨapuŋane. taj ʔllaw na ku*reŋere ħjaʔ ɣa wutai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
